case_title: SF TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATIONS UNIT VS. MOHEMID MAUD ABUGHARIEB

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES SMITH--INVESTIGATOR--SF TAX COLLECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATIONS UNIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABUGHARIEB, MOHEMID MAUD $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM THAT WAS SERVED ON DEFENDANT BY SUB SERVICE, NOT BY COURT CERTIFIED MAIL, WAS RECEIVED TODAY IN AN ENVELOPE ADDRESSED TO THE COURT WITH RETURN RE WRONG ADDRESS WRITTEN ON IT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SF TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATIONS UNIT AS TO DEFENDANT ABUGHARIEB, MOHEMID MAUD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
